briefs.title: Proposed: Rezoning of 5035 Beresford Street, Burnaby — Council to Consider
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to consider a rezoning application (REZ 25-11) for the property at 5035 Beresford Street. The proposal would change the land-use rules — meaning what can be built or operated there — in line with the Royal Oak Community Plan.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business or property is near 5035 Beresford St and attend the public hearing to have your say.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Retail
